docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-24-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-24-2023 BY JEFFREY S. ROSS. PLAINTIFF MANUEL ARADA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL SARCONA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JEFFREY ROSS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D502)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY ARANDA, MANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT SARCONA, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARANDA, MANUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SARCONA, MICHAEL DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING. SEE ATTACHMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40 WAVIED. SERVED FEB-24-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SARCONA, MICHAEL
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT SARCONA, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2023 - TRANSFERRED FORTHWITH TO BE HEARD IN DEPT 502 BEFORE JUDGE ROSS TO MAR-24-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 502. PLAINTIFF NOT STIPULATION FOR CASE BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARANDA, MANUEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
